title: Crispy Dutch Rice Noodles
description: A comforting Dutch-inspired dish featuring crisp, golden rice vermicelli tossed with tender turkey breast, fresh broccoli, and carrots, finished in an air fryer for a lowcalorie, umamipacked bite.
instructions: Rinse the rice vermicelli under cold water, soak for 10 minutes, then drain and toss with a pinch of salt and sesame oil.
Spread the noodles in a single layer in the air fryer basket.
Air fry for 5 minutes, shaking halfway, until golden and slightly crispy.
Meanwhile, heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and add a splash of oil.
Sauté the minced garlic and ginger for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the turkey slices and cook for 2–3 minutes until browned on all sides.
Add broccoli florets and carrot ribbons, stir‑fry for 3–4 minutes until vegetables are tender‑crisp.
Stir in soy sauce, black pepper, and sea salt; cook for another minute.
Return the sautéed mixture to the skillet with the noodles, toss to combine.
Air fry the combined dish again for 3 minutes to finish crisping the noodles.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
